title: rosa rugosa var. alba
intro: Rosa rugosa var. alba is a variety of the rugosa rose, a shrub native to East Asia, known for its fragrant white flowers and thorny stems. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, which are derived from its essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of Rosa rugosa var. alba include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and support the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Rosa rugosa var. alba can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and salves, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
